mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet_memories (pet_id, memory_key, memory_value, type, importance, is_permanent, version, previous_value) VALUES (#{petId}, #{memoryKey}, #{memoryValue}, #{type}, #{importance}, #{isPermanent}, #{version}, #{previousValue})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pet_memories WHERE pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY is_permanent DESC, importance DESC, created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM pet_memories WHERE pet_id = #{petId} AND type = #{type} ORDER BY is_permanent DESC, importance DESC, created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE pet_memories SET memory_value = #{memoryValue}, importance = #{importance}, is_permanent = #{isPermanent}, version = #{version}, previous_value = #{previousValue}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
